tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsLocationsBatchesCreate
tools.description: Creates a batch workload that executes asynchronously.

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsLocationsBatchesList
tools.description: Lists batch workloads.

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsAutoscalingPoliciesCreate
tools.description: Creates new autoscaling policy.

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsAutoscalingPoliciesList
tools.description: Lists autoscaling policies in the project.

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsClustersCreate
tools.description: Creates a cluster in a project. The returned Operation.metadata will be ClusterOperationMetadata (https://cloud.google.com/dataproc/docs/reference/rpc/google.cloud.dataproc.v1#clusteroperationmetadata).

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsClustersDelete
tools.description: Deletes a cluster in a project. The returned Operation.metadata will be ClusterOperationMetadata (https://cloud.google.com/dataproc/docs/reference/rpc/google.cloud.dataproc.v1#clusteroperationmetadata).

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsClustersDiagnose
tools.description: Gets cluster diagnostic information. The returned Operation.metadata will be ClusterOperationMetadata (https://cloud.google.com/dataproc/docs/reference/rpc/google.cloud.dataproc.v1#clusteroperationmetadata). After the operation completes, Operation.response contains DiagnoseClusterResults (https://cloud.google.com/dataproc/docs/reference/rpc/google.cloud.dataproc.v1#diagnoseclusterresults).

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsClustersGet
tools.description: Gets the resource representation for a cluster in a project.

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsClustersInjectCredentials
tools.description: Inject encrypted credentials into all of the VMs in a cluster.The target cluster must be a personal auth cluster assigned to the user who is issuing the RPC.

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsClustersList
tools.description: Lists all regions/{region}/clusters in a project alphabetically.

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsClustersNodeGroupsCreate
tools.description: Creates a node group in a cluster. The returned Operation.metadata is NodeGroupOperationMetadata (https://cloud.google.com/dataproc/docs/reference/rpc/google.cloud.dataproc.v1#nodegroupoperationmetadata).

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsClustersNodeGroupsResize
tools.description: Resizes a node group in a cluster. The returned Operation.metadata is NodeGroupOperationMetadata (https://cloud.google.com/dataproc/docs/reference/rpc/google.cloud.dataproc.v1#nodegroupoperationmetadata).

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsClustersPatch
tools.description: Updates a cluster in a project. The returned Operation.metadata will be ClusterOperationMetadata (https://cloud.google.com/dataproc/docs/reference/rpc/google.cloud.dataproc.v1#clusteroperationmetadata). The cluster must be in a RUNNING state or an error is returned.

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsClustersRepair
tools.description: Repairs a cluster.

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsClustersStart
tools.description: Starts a cluster in a project.

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsClustersStop
tools.description: Stops a cluster in a project.

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsJobsCancel
tools.description: Starts a job cancellation request. To access the job resource after cancellation, call regions/{region}/jobs.list (https://cloud.google.com/dataproc/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.regions.jobs/list) or regions/{region}/jobs.get (https://cloud.google.com/dataproc/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.regions.jobs/get).

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsJobsDelete
tools.description: Deletes the job from the project. If the job is active, the delete fails, and the response returns FAILED_PRECONDITION.

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsJobsGet
tools.description: Gets the resource representation for a job in a project.

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsJobsList
tools.description: Lists regions/{region}/jobs in a project.

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsJobsPatch
tools.description: Updates a job in a project.

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsJobsSubmit
tools.description: Submits a job to a cluster.

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsJobsSubmitAsOperation
tools.description: Submits job to a cluster.

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsOperationsCancel
tools.description: Starts asynchronous cancellation on a long-running operation. The server makes a best effort to cancel the operation, but success is not guaranteed. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED. Clients can use Operations.GetOperation or other methods to check whether the cancellation succeeded or whether the operation completed despite cancellation. On successful cancellation, the operation is not deleted; instead, it becomes an operation with an Operation.error value with a google.rpc.Status.code of 1, corresponding to Code.CANCELLED.

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsWorkflowTemplatesCreate
tools.description: Creates new workflow template.

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsWorkflowTemplatesDelete
tools.description: Deletes a workflow template. It does not cancel in-progress workflows.

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsWorkflowTemplatesGet
tools.description: Retrieves the latest workflow template.Can retrieve previously instantiated template by specifying optional version parameter.

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsWorkflowTemplatesGetIamPolicy
tools.description: Gets the access control policy for a resource. Returns an empty policy if the resource exists and does not have a policy set.

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsWorkflowTemplatesInstantiate
tools.description: Instantiates a template and begins execution.The returned Operation can be used to track execution of workflow by polling operations.get. The Operation will complete when entire workflow is finished.The running workflow can be aborted via operations.cancel. This will cause any inflight jobs to be cancelled and workflow-owned clusters to be deleted.The Operation.metadata will be WorkflowMetadata (https://cloud.google.com/dataproc/docs/reference/rpc/google.cloud.dataproc.v1#workflowmetadata). Also see Using WorkflowMetadata (https://cloud.google.com/dataproc/docs/concepts/workflows/debugging#using_workflowmetadata).On successful completion, Operation.response will be Empty.

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsWorkflowTemplatesInstantiateInline
tools.description: Instantiates a template and begins execution.This method is equivalent to executing the sequence CreateWorkflowTemplate, InstantiateWorkflowTemplate, DeleteWorkflowTemplate.The returned Operation can be used to track execution of workflow by polling operations.get. The Operation will complete when entire workflow is finished.The running workflow can be aborted via operations.cancel. This will cause any inflight jobs to be cancelled and workflow-owned clusters to be deleted.The Operation.metadata will be WorkflowMetadata (https://cloud.google.com/dataproc/docs/reference/rpc/google.cloud.dataproc.v1#workflowmetadata). Also see Using WorkflowMetadata (https://cloud.google.com/dataproc/docs/concepts/workflows/debugging#using_workflowmetadata).On successful completion, Operation.response will be Empty.

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsWorkflowTemplatesList
tools.description: Lists workflows that match the specified filter in the request.

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsWorkflowTemplatesSetIamPolicy
tools.description: Sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces any existing policy.Can return NOT_FOUND, INVALID_ARGUMENT, and PERMISSION_DENIED errors.

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsWorkflowTemplatesTestIamPermissions
tools.description: Returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of permissions, not a NOT_FOUND error.Note: This operation is designed to be used for building permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.

tools.name: projects.dataprocProjectsRegionsWorkflowTemplatesUpdate
tools.description: Updates (replaces) workflow template. The updated template must contain version that matches the current server version.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
